verses.2: Wain yaraw ayatan yuAAridoo wayaqooloo sihrun mustamirrun
verses.3: Wakaththaboo waittabaAAoo ahwaahum wakullu amrin mustaqirrun
verses.4: Walaqad jaahum mina alanbai ma feehi muzdajarun
verses.6: Fatawalla AAanhum yawma yadAAu alddaAAi ila shayin nukurin
verses.7: KhushshaAAan absaruhum yakhrujoona mina alajdathi kaannahum jaradun muntashirun
verses.8: MuhtiAAeena ila alddaAAi yaqoolu alkafiroona hatha yawmun AAasirun
verses.9: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin fakaththaboo AAabdana waqaloo majnoonun waizdujira
verses.12: Wafajjarna alarda AAuyoonan failtaqa almao AAala amrin qad qudira
verses.14: Tajree biaAAyunina jazaan liman kana kufira
verses.15: Walaqad taraknaha ayatan fahal min muddakirin
verses.17: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin
verses.18: Kaththabat AAadun fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri
verses.19: Inna arsalna AAalayhim reehan sarsaran fee yawmi nahsin mustamirrin
verses.20: TanziAAu alnnasa kaannahum aAAjazu nakhlin munqaAAirin
verses.22: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin
verses.24: Faqaloo abasharan minna wahidan nattabiAAuhu inna ithan lafee dalalin wasuAAurin
verses.25: Aolqiya alththikru AAalayhi min baynina bal huwa kaththabun ashirun
verses.27: Inna mursiloo alnnaqati fitnatan lahum fairtaqibhum waistabir
verses.28: Wanabbihum anna almaa qismatun baynahum kullu shirbin muhtadarun
verses.31: Inna arsalna AAalayhim sayhatan wahidatan fakanoo kahasheemi almuhtathiri
verses.32: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin
verses.34: Inna arsalna AAalayhim hasiban illa ala lootin najjaynahum bisaharin
verses.35: NiAAmatan min AAindina kathalika najzee man shakara
verses.37: Walaqad rawadoohu AAan dayfihi fatamasna aAAyunahum fathooqoo AAathabee wanuthuri
verses.40: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin
verses.42: Kaththaboo biayatina kulliha faakhathnahum akhtha AAazeezin muqtadirin
verses.43: Akuffarukum khayrun min olaikum am lakum baraatun fee alzzuburi
verses.46: Bali alssaAAatu mawAAiduhum waalssaAAatu adha waamarru
verses.48: Yawma yushaboona fee alnnari AAala wujoohihim thooqoo massa saqara
verses.50: Wama amruna illa wahidatun kalamhin bialbasari
verses.51: Walaqad ahlakna ashyaAAakum fahal min muddakirin
verses.55: Fee maqAAadi sidqin AAinda maleekin muqtadirin
